sentences.solution: I usually cook dinner at home.
She goes to the supermarket every week.
We have an appointment at three o'clock.

freewriting.prompt: Beschreibe deinen typischen Morgen auf Englisch.
freewriting.example: I usually wake up at seven o'clock. First, I drink a cup of coffee. Then I take a shower and get dressed. I leave the house at eight.

freewriting.prompt: Was machst du nach der Arbeit? Schreib 2–3 Sätze.
freewriting.example: After work, I usually go to the supermarket. Then I cook dinner and relax at home. Sometimes I call a friend or watch a film.
I live in a quiet neighbourhood. There is a park nearby and a small supermarket on the corner. The people here are very friendly.

sentences.solution: My flight departs at six in the morning.
I booked a hotel near the city centre.
The train has a delay of twenty minutes.
We need to change trains in Brussels.

freewriting.prompt: Beschreibe deine letzte Reise (oder eine Traumreise) auf Englisch.
freewriting.example: Last summer I travelled to Portugal. I stayed in a small hotel near the beach. The weather was wonderful and the food was delicious.

freewriting.prompt: Was packst du immer in deinen Koffer? Schreib 2–3 Sätze.
freewriting.example: I always pack my passport and some comfortable clothes. I also bring a book for the journey. Of course, I never forget my phone charger.

freewriting.prompt: Beschreibe einen Flughafen oder Bahnhof auf Englisch.
freewriting.example: The airport was very busy. There were long queues at the check-in desk. I had to wait one hour before boarding.

sentences.solution: At the weekend I like to go for a walk.
She reads a book every evening.
We often meet our friends on Saturdays.
They went to a concert last Friday.

freewriting.prompt: Was machst du in deiner Freizeit am liebsten? Schreib 2–3 Sätze.
freewriting.example: In my free time I enjoy reading and going for walks. At the weekend I often meet my friends for coffee. Sometimes we go to the cinema or a concert.

freewriting.prompt: Beschreibe ein perfektes Wochenende auf Englisch.
freewriting.example: My perfect weekend starts with a long sleep. Then I have breakfast outside and take a walk in the park. In the evening I relax at home with a good film.

freewriting.prompt: Hast du ein Hobby? Erkläre es kurz auf Englisch.
freewriting.example: My hobby is photography. I take pictures of nature and people. I also edit the photos on my computer. It is a great way to be creative.
